steps.title: Interpret the meaning of at least 190 signatures
steps.content: When the problem states the student needs at least 190 signatures, this establishes a minimum requirement. Mathematically, at least means the total must be greater than or equal to 190: $$\text{total signatures} \geq 190$$

steps.title: Set up the inequality with Monday and Tuesday signatures
steps.content: The student collects 30 signatures on Monday and $s$ additional signatures on Tuesday. The total is $30 + s$. Substituting into our constraint: $$30 + s \geq 190$$ This matches choice B — B is correct.
